case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. HENRY DAVID PORTILLO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $640.10 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT PORTILLO, HENRY DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT HENRY DAVID PORTILLO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTILLO, HENRY DAVID $640.10 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $755.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
